title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow Once
scenario: Verify Location Sharing dialogue flow on iOS after user initially denied location permission during onboarding
steps: Open Lens app, tap hamburger menu, tap Find My Device. Verify a permission popup appears with 'Cancel' and 'Enable Now' options, with FMD screen visible in background.
Tap 'Enable Now' and verify the app navigates to phone settings.

Give Lens app location permission with 'Ask Next Time or When I Share', return to app, and verify the 'Allow Poly Lens to use your location' popup appears with 'Allow Once', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow' options, with FMD screen visible in background and permission window closed.
expected: After granting location permission with 'Ask Next Time or When I Share', the 'Allow Poly Lens to use your location' popup appears with 'Allow Once', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow' options, with FMD screen visible in background and permission window closed.
